content.text:
[cron:1dc22710-ba22-49c2-b438-b34ae6829d80 OpenClaw Daily Backup] 执行 OpenClaw 自动备份任务：
1. 备份 C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw 到 D:\openclaw-backup-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd')
2. 使用 robocopy 复制文件（排除 node_modules 和 .git）
3. 初始化 git 仓库并提交
4. 推送到 GitHub 仓库 https://github.com/SUPPAN550/openclaw 的分支 backups/$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd')
5. 使用 Token: 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
6. 完成后发送确认消息

注意：如果分支已存在，需要先拉取或创建新分支名（可加时间戳）
Current time: Thursday, March 19th, 2026 — 11:48 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-19 03:48 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

This is a cron job for OpenClaw automatic backup. Let me break down the tasks:

1. Backup C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw to D:\openclaw-backup-2026-03-19
2. Use robocopy to copy files (exclude node_modules and .git)
3. Initialize git repo and commit
4. Push to GitHub branch backups/2026-03-19
5. Use the provided GitHub token
6. Send confirmation message
